source.scenario: missing_cite: one prop whose cites entry points at a UUID v7 not present in the file — validator MUST emit R2 unresolved-cite finding

coverage.purpose: Smoke-test that R2 cite-resolve fires on a dangling UUID under v1.2 schema and renders both the source prop display ordinal and the unresolved UUID inside the finding text per Task 2.4 diagnostic format.
